title: PROJECT_CONFIG
description: Project configuration for multi-session Claude Code workflows. Replaces GITHUB_CONFIG.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump when breaking changes are made to this schema.

type.description: Project type. Software projects get all 11 session roles; non-software may skip chk1, chk2, playtester.

cloudId.description: Atlassian Cloud ID for API calls.

epicKey.description: Jira epic key for this project (e.g., CPT-3).

boardUrl.description: Jira board URL for human reference.

issuesEnabled.description: Whether GitHub Issues are enabled. Should be false (Jira is source of truth).

requiredStatusChecks.description: CI job names that must pass before merge. Only include checks that consistently pass.

strict.description: Require branches to be up-to-date with default branch before merge.

enforceAdmins.description: Whether admins are subject to branch protection. Set true once workflow is stable.

allowForcePushes.description: Allow force pushes to protected branch. Should be false.

allowDeletions.description: Allow deleting protected branch. Should be false.

roles.description: Active session roles for this project.

intervalMinutes.description: Loop interval in minutes. 0 = no loop (on-demand only).

prompt.description: Path to the loop prompt file, relative to the worktree root. Defaults to 'loops/loop.md'.

driver.description: How this loop is driven. 'shell' = CPT-42 headless wrapper at .claude/loops-sh/<role>.sh (context-safe for long runs). 'session' = CPT-41 in-session /loop in the interactive TUI. 'none' = equivalent to intervalMinutes:0.

stateFile.description: Path (relative to worktree root) to the role's state handoff file. Shell driver reads/writes this between iterations. Defaults to '.claude/state/<role>.md'.

loops.description: Per-role loop intervals, prompt files, and driver. Only the 8 polling roles are valid (master, triager, reviewer, merger, chk1, chk2, fixer, implementer). planner/performance/playtester never loop — they are on-demand only. Relocated from .sessions.loops in CPT-42.

project.description: Project-level env vars exported into every session. The variable <DIRNAME_SANITIZED>_PATH (directory name uppercased with any non-[A-Z0-9_] chars replaced by underscore, then _PATH appended; e.g. 'choc-skills' → 'CHOC_SKILLS_PATH') is auto-set to the project root and does not need to be declared here. Keys declared here must match ^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$.

^(master|planner|implementer|fixer|merge.description: Per-session env vars. Merged over project-level vars; session wins on conflict.

sessions.description: Per-session env vars keyed by role name.

env.description: Environment variables for launched Claude sessions. Secrets should NOT be stored here — future integration with BWS/AWS Secrets Manager is planned.

tool.description: Coverage tool name (e.g., kcov, bashcov, istanbul).

thresholds.description: Coverage thresholds. Must reflect actual values, not aspirations. Ratchet up, never lower silently.

setupInstructions.description: How to set up the sandbox environment.

standard.description: Which standard is being deviated from.

deviations.description: Documented deviations from PROJECT_STANDARDS.md. Every deviation must be justified.
